title: dev.contracts.list
description: List the contract metadata registered in the current build. Read-only, replay-safe.

contracts.description: All contracts registered at startup. Order is by `name` ascending.

version.description: Semantic version of the contract shape.

schema_path.description: Absolute path to the JSON Schema file backing this contract.

direction.description: Matches the direction field in the schema's operation block.

replay_safe.description: True for read-only contracts that may be replayed from the developer surface.

sensitive_fields.description: Optional JSON Pointer paths whose values are redacted before storage.

ts_hash.description: Optional TypeScript-side declaration hash. Present when known at startup.

rust_hash.description: Optional Rust-side declaration hash. Present when known at startup.

mismatch.description: True when ts_hash and rust_hash are both present and differ.

errors.message: Developer mode is disabled. Enable devMode in settings to read the contract registry.
